Phonology
=========

Phonology feature extractors grouped by functional family.

Articulatory
------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated
   :nosignatures:

   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.approximant.ArticulatoryApproximantExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.consonant.ArticulatoryConsonantExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.features.ArticulatoryFeaturesExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.fricative.ArticulatoryFricativeExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.nasal.ArticulatoryNasalExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.plosive.ArticulatoryPlosiveExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.voiced.ArticulatoryVoicedExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.voiceless.ArticulatoryVoicelessExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.articulatory.vowel.ArticulatoryVowelExtractor

   ~voxatlas.features.phonology.formant.trajectory.FormantTrajectoryExtractor
